title: PDF/ Document automation from whole Monday board instead of single item line

posts.author: Moeydc (Jon Moses)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good afternoon MC,

Has anyone solved the problem of being able to automate document population from an entire monday board as opposed to a single item line.

We have tried Eledo and Docugen but it doesn’t seem to be possible from what we can see.

Has anyone found a solution or a workaround for this?

*Basically each client file has its own board and depending on the needs we have 5-10 different PDF forms that we would prefill and then send to the client for signing which we are currently doing manually with copy and paste.

Appreciate any help on this!
